  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to study DNA double-strand break repair pathways using transient transfection of extrachromosomal reporter substrates and luminescence detection.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "Prepare a sample by performing electrophoresis at 120 V for 2 hours, loading an uncut reporter plasmid as a control.",
    "For the resection-independent MMEJ assay in HEK-293 cells, add 0.5 μg reporter substrate and 0.66 μg control luciferase plasmid per 1 × 10^6 cells.",
    "Dilute 88 μL of reporter NanoLuc substrate in 8,800 μL of buffer for one 96-well plate."
  ],
